Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x05E9 "TARZAN-4400-05E9" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $4400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Tarzan.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $4400 which copies 256 bytes of data from $4410 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
